notes: Per-site PUE published quarterly by Google. TTM PUE = trailing twelve-month average. Capacity estimated from public filings.

facility_name: NREL Energy Systems Integration Facility (ESIF) HPC Data Center
cooling_type: warm-water direct liquid cooling (chiller-less, waste heat capture)
pue_source: NREL / US DOE Better Buildings Initiative, annualized PUE 1.036
opportunity_summary: World-leading PUE of 1.036 (annualized average). Chiller-less design with warm-water direct liquid cooling captures 97% of waste heat for building heating. DCD Eco-Sustainability Award 2018. Under 2MW -- ideal SOM candidate for Solar Steam proof-of-concept.
notes: Annualized PUE 1.036. Design target was 1.06 or better. 182,000 sq ft LEED Platinum facility. Hosts Eagle and Kestrel supercomputers. Under 2MW HPC data center.

pue_source: IREN investor materials, Q4 2025: 1.1 PUE across BC sites (air-cooled)
opportunity_summary: IREN Canal Flats site in BC. 30MW, PUE 1.1 (air-cooled). BC cold climate advantage. Transitioning to liquid cooling for Blackwell GPUs.
notes: IREN BC sites use 1.1 PUE estimate from investor materials. Capacity: 30MW Canal Flats, 80MW Mackenzie, 50MW Prince George.

pue_source: IREN investor materials, Q4 2025: 1.1 PUE across BC sites
opportunity_summary: IREN Mackenzie site. 80MW, PUE 1.1. BC hydropower, cold climate.
notes: IREN BC sites PUE 1.1 per investor materials.

pue_source: IREN investor materials, Q4 2025: 1.1 PUE across BC sites
opportunity_summary: IREN Prince George site. 50MW, PUE 1.1. BC hydropower.
notes: IREN BC sites PUE 1.1 per investor materials.

pue_source: IREN press release: projected PUE 1.05-1.10 range for liquid-cooled facility
opportunity_summary: IREN Horizon 1 at Childress 750MW campus. 75MW Phase 1, liquid-cooled for Nvidia Blackwell GPUs. Projected PUE 1.05-1.10. Q4 2025 target delivery.
notes: Design PUE 1.05-1.10 for liquid-cooled. 200kW per rack. Part of 750MW Childress campus. Under construction H2 2025.

facility_name: Meta -- Global Fleet Average (15 owned campuses)
pue_source: Meta 2024 Sustainability Report / Environmental Data Index
opportunity_summary: Meta global fleet PUE 1.08 (2024). 15+ owned data centers. Does not publish per-site PUE. Fleet average is excellent but individual site data unavailable.
notes: Fleet average PUE 1.08. Does NOT publish per-site breakdown. 14,975 GWh total consumption in 2024. Not SOM candidate (massive scale).

cooling_type: fjord seawater cooling (565m deep, 8C constant, siphon effect)
pue_source: Lefdal Mine Datacenter official site, PUE 1.08-1.15 depending on config
opportunity_summary: Underground data center in former olivine mine, 150m inside mountain, below sea level. Fjord cooling at 8C via siphon effect. PUE 1.08-1.15 depending on cooling tech and UPS config. 100% Norwegian hydropower. WUE near zero. Under 5MW -- strong SOM candidate.
notes: PUE range 1.08-1.15 per operator. Best case 1.08, depends on cooling tech choice and UPS topology. 45MW total capacity at full build. Current operational ~4.5MW. BNP Paribas customer.

facility_name: Alibaba Cloud -- Hangzhou Qianhu Data Center
cooling_type: single-phase immersion liquid cooling (full server submersion)
pue_source: Alibaba Cloud blog: world's largest liquid-cooled cluster, PUE 1.09
opportunity_summary: Alibaba Hangzhou Qianhu data center. PUE 1.09, claimed lowest in the world at time of disclosure. World's largest liquid-cooled cluster with tens of thousands of immersion-cooled servers. Energy reduced 70%+ vs conventional.
notes: Self-reported by Alibaba Cloud. PUE 1.09 annual average. Immersion cooling using proprietary dielectric coolant. Hyperscale, not SOM.

pue_source: Baidu/IDCNova: Yangquan annual average PUE 1.09 (2018+)
opportunity_summary: Baidu Yangquan Cloud Computing Center. Annual average PUE 1.09. Among China's most efficient DCs when first reported. 100,000+ servers.
notes: Self-reported PUE 1.09 since ~2018. Shanxi province, continental climate with cold winters. IDCNova reported as China's No.1 PUE at the time.

pue_source: KDDI/Gigabyte: container-type immersion DC achieves PUE 1.05-1.07
opportunity_summary: KDDI containerized immersion-cooled micro DC. PUE 1.05-1.07. 12ft shipping container form factor. 43% power reduction for cooling. 94% reduction in temperature control electricity vs air cooling in trials. Under 1MW -- strong SOM candidate for edge deployments.
notes: Container-type immersion cooling. PUE 1.05-1.07 range. Single-phase immersion. Developed with Gigabyte. Targeting carbon neutrality by FY2026.

cooling_type: indirect air-to-air cooling (free cooling, Nordic climate)
pue_source: DigiPlex/Data Center Catalog: PUE factor of only 1.1
opportunity_summary: STACK/DigiPlex OSL03 Fetsund campus. PUE 1.1 via innovative Air-to-Air cooling exploiting Norway's climate. ~10MW. Now part of STACK Infrastructure portfolio. Potential SOM candidate at 10MW boundary.
notes: Acquired by IPI Partners, now STACK Infrastructure. PUE 1.1 disclosed. Indirect air-cooling, no mechanical refrigeration.

cooling_type: Aquifer Thermal Energy Storage (ATES) + indirect cooling
pue_source: Baxtel/Equinix: AM11 PUE 1.1 using groundwater ATES
opportunity_summary: Equinix AM11 Amsterdam at Science Park. PUE 1.1 using Aquifer Thermal Energy Storage instead of mechanical cooling. Among lowest operating PUEs in retail colocation sector. ~9MW. Strong SOM candidate.
notes: PUE 1.1 per Baxtel listing. Amsterdam Science Park campus. ATES groundwater cooling is key differentiator vs Equinix fleet average of 1.39.

facility_name: Chindata -- AI Data Center (Lingqiu campus, Datong)
cooling_type: cold-plate liquid cooling + magnetic levitation phase-change air
pue_source: Chindata Group: Lingqiu campus hybrid cooling achieves PUE 1.13
opportunity_summary: Chindata Lingqiu campus in Datong City. PUE 1.13 with hybrid cold-plate liquid + mag-lev phase-change air cooling. Part of AI Data Center Total Solution 2.0 (Oct 2024).
notes: Self-reported by Chindata. Also claims PUE as low as 1.10 with full immersive liquid cooling in Solution 2.0.

facility_name: Chindata -- AI DC Total Solution 2.0 (Immersive Reference Design)
pue_source: Chindata Group AI DC Solution 2.0 press release: PUE as low as 1.10
opportunity_summary: Chindata X-Cooling immersion liquid cooling solution achieves PUE as low as 1.10. Supports 8-150kW per cabinet. Oct 2024 announcement.
notes: Chindata self-reported. Reference design PUE, may vary by deployment. X-Cooling = air, liquid, hybrid options.

pue_source: Industry reports: GDS Shanghai complex PUE 1.12
opportunity_summary: GDS Shanghai colocation complex. PUE 1.12 reported. One of China's largest third-party DC operators. Premium wholesale colocation.
notes: PUE 1.12 from industry analysis. GDS does not prominently publish per-site PUE. Confidence: MEDIUM.

cooling_type: free cooling (air) + Nvidia liquid cooling system (installing)
pue_source: Nebius 2024 Sustainability Report: PUE as low as 1.1 under high IT loads
opportunity_summary: Nebius Mantsala AI data center in Finland. PUE 1.1 (at high loads), 1.13 at full capacity. Free cooling, heat recovery heats 2,500 Finnish homes (20,000 MWh/yr). Expanding to 75MW. Custom servers saved 10 GWh in 2024.
notes: PUE 1.1 at high loads, 1.13 at full capacity. Currently 25MW, expanding to 75MW. Nvidia liquid cooling being installed for Blackwell GPUs. Formerly Yandex.

pue_source: Microsoft Datacenters Sustainability: best PUE 1.11 in Wyoming
opportunity_summary: Microsoft's most efficient data center region: Wyoming at PUE 1.11. Cold, dry climate. Microsoft global average FY24 was 1.16, FY25 was 1.17.
notes: Microsoft discloses best/worst but not per-site. Best: Wyoming 1.11, Worst: Illinois 1.35. Global FY24: 1.16, Americas FY24: 1.16, EMEA FY24: 1.16, APAC FY24: 1.25.

cooling_type: mixed (air, evaporative, liquid in newest gen)
pue_source: Microsoft Datacenters: Americas FY24 PUE 1.16, FY25 PUE 1.16
opportunity_summary: Microsoft Americas regional average PUE 1.16 (FY24 and FY25). Newest generation design PUE 1.12. Fleet-level data only, no per-site.
notes: Regional average, not site-specific. Design PUE for newest gen: 1.12. FY periods are July-June.

operator_company: Vienna University of Technology / TU Wien
pue_source: Data Center Frontier / GRC: VSC-3 mechanical PUE of 1.02
opportunity_summary: Vienna Scientific Cluster 3, installed 2014, uses GRC immersion cooling with Supermicro servers. Mechanical PUE 1.02 (cooling overhead is only 2% of IT power). Under 1MW -- excellent SOM candidate for HPC/academic sector.
notes: Mechanical PUE 1.02 (not full-facility PUE which would be slightly higher with UPS/lighting). GRC + Intel + ClusterVision + Supermicro. ~1MW estimated.

cooling_type: indirect adiabatic cooling (first multi-floor urban DC with this tech)
pue_source: Telehouse / KDDI: North Two design PUE 1.16
opportunity_summary: Telehouse North Two in London Docklands. Design PUE 1.16 using indirect adiabatic cooling -- first multi-floor urban DC to use this system. ~8MW. Potential SOM candidate.
notes: Design PUE 1.16. Opened November 2016. KDDI subsidiary. DCD Award winner. Maritime climate of London enables adiabatic cooling.

cooling_type: hybrid water + immersion liquid cooling (proprietary, 16 patents)
pue_source: OVHcloud blog: hybrid immersion cooling partial PUE (PPUE) of 1.004
opportunity_summary: OVHcloud hybrid immersion cooling achieves partial PUE (PPUE) of 1.004 -- nearly perfect efficiency for the cooling subsystem. 16 patents. Reduces server cooling power by up to 90%. IMPORTANT: This is PPUE (partial), not full facility PUE.
notes: PPUE 1.004 is for the cooling subsystem boundary only, NOT full facility PUE. Full facility PUE would be higher when including UPS, lighting, etc. Still exceptional. OVHcloud builds own servers.

facility_name: Sabey Data Centers -- Columbia Campus (Quincy, WA)
pue_source: Sabey Data Centers: Columbia campus average PUE 1.2
opportunity_summary: Sabey Columbia campus in Quincy, WA. Average PUE 1.2. Near hydropower dams, cool/dry climate. ~10MW. Potential SOM candidate at 10MW boundary.
notes: PUE 1.2 average. Quincy, WA is a major DC hub due to cheap Columbia River hydropower. Sabey also operates in Seattle (PUE ~1.5).

pue_source: Kao Data: SLA-backed PUE of 1.2 at all Harlow facilities
opportunity_summary: Kao Data KLON-01 at Harlow campus. SLA-backed PUE 1.2, consistent even at partial loads. Indirect evaporative cooling, no mechanical refrigeration. 8.8MW. Potential SOM candidate.
notes: SLA-backed PUE 1.2. Carrier-neutral. First European operator to switch backup generators to HVO sustainable fuel.

pue_source: Kao Data: SLA-backed PUE of 1.2 at all Harlow facilities
opportunity_summary: Kao Data KLON-02. SLA-backed PUE 1.2. Second 10MW building at Harlow campus.
notes: SLA-backed PUE 1.2. Same spec as KLON-01.

pue_source: Vantage press release: DUB1 annualized PUE of 1.2 using virtually no water
opportunity_summary: Vantage Dublin DUB1 campus. Annualized PUE 1.2 using virtually no water for cooling. Next-generation energy solution with tidal and wind renewable energy. 16MW.
notes: Design PUE 1.2. Waterless cooling is notable for Dublin climate. Vantage global average ~1.26 (2023).

pue_source: Green Mountain: PUE below 1.15 year-round via fjord/lake cooling
opportunity_summary: Green Mountain DC2-Telemark. PUE below 1.15 year-round. Freshwater cooling from nearby lake. 100% Norwegian hydropower. Tier III certified. ~6MW. Potential SOM candidate.
notes: PUE <1.15 per operator. Uptime Tier III certified. ISO 9001 + ISO 14001.

pue_source: EcoDataCenter/Iceotope: operating PUE of 1.03 with chassis-level immersion
opportunity_summary: EcoDataCenter Falun immersion zone. Operating PUE 1.03 with chassis-level immersion cooling (world's first Iceotope + Schneider Electric deployment). 14% CapEx savings, 10%+ energy savings vs air-cooled. 2MW. Excellent SOM candidate.
notes: PUE 1.03 for immersion cooling zone specifically. Facility overall PUE ~1.15. World's first chassis-level immersion cooling. UNFCCC recognized. Climate Positive DC.

cooling_type: direct liquid cooling + immersion + air cooling (hybrid)
pue_source: EcoDataCenter: overall facility PUE less than 1.15
opportunity_summary: EcoDataCenter 2 commissioned early 2025. 12MW with 96 Vertiv Liebert PCW chilled water units. Full cooling autonomy: air, DLC, immersion. PUE <1.15 overall.
notes: Commissioned early 2025. 12MW. Vertiv cooling infrastructure. Overall facility PUE <1.15.

pue_source: Cologix: MTL8 annualized PUE below 1.3 (blog claims sub-1.3, LEED Gold)
opportunity_summary: Cologix MTL8 in Montreal. Annualized PUE below 1.3 (LEED Gold certified). ~6MW Scalelogix data center. 99% renewable energy from Hydro-Quebec. Canada's first LEED Gold colocation DC.
notes: PUE below 1.3, not precise. Conservative estimate ~1.20 for this file given LEED Gold + Quebec climate. Company-wide PUE 1.486.
